_comment: Shared oracle for skill frontmatter type validation. The Python linter (lint_skill_contracts.frontmatter.frontmatter_type_errors) and the JS converter (loader.skillFrontmatterTypeErrors) are both asserted against this one file, so a drift in either engine fails its suite instead of silently diverging. invalidFields is the sorted set of frontmatter fields both engines must flag; [] means fully valid. Every case is valid YAML, so type validation is the only verdict axis. When editing, confirm both engines agree before changing invalidFields.

cases.name: all fields valid (flow array)
cases.text:
---
name: kramme:demo:sample
description: A demo skill
argument-hint: "[target]"
disable-model-invocation: "false"
user-invocable: true
kramme-platforms: [claude-code, "codex"]
---
# Body

cases.name: all fields valid (block array)
cases.text:
---
name: kramme:demo:sample
description: A demo skill
disable-model-invocation: false
user-invocable: true
kramme-platforms:
  - claude-code
  - codex
---
# Body

cases.name: optional fields omitted
cases.text:
---
name: kramme:demo:sample
description: A demo skill
disable-model-invocation: false
user-invocable: true
---
# Body

cases.name: legacy numeric-looking strings stay strings
cases.text:
---
name: +1
description: 1e3
disable-model-invocation: false
user-invocable: true
kramme-platforms:
  - -1e2
---
# Body

cases.name: quoted boolean with trailing comment
cases.text:
---
name: s
description: d
disable-model-invocation: false
user-invocable: "true" # stays user invocable
---
# Body

cases.name: block array quoted item with trailing comment
cases.text:
---
name: s
description: d
disable-model-invocation: false
user-invocable: true
kramme-platforms:
  - "codex" # primary
  - claude-code
---
# Body

cases.name: indented continued description string
cases.text:
---
name: s
description:
  Continued on the next line
disable-model-invocation: false
user-invocable: true
---
# Body

cases.name: flow array with escaped quote
cases.text:
---
name: s
description: d
disable-model-invocation: false
user-invocable: true
kramme-platforms: ["claude\",code", codex]
---
# Body

cases.name: flow array trailing comma
cases.text:
---
name: s
description: d
disable-model-invocation: false
user-invocable: true
kramme-platforms: [codex,]
---
# Body

cases.name: explicit !!str tag and anchor in flow array
cases.text:
---
name: s
description: d
disable-model-invocation: false
user-invocable: true
kramme-platforms: [!!str 1, &target codex]
---
# Body

cases.name: every primitive field invalid
cases.text:
---
name: false
description:
argument-hint: false
disable-model-invocation: maybe
user-invocable: 0
kramme-platforms: codex
---
# Body

cases.name: empty block scalar description
cases.text:
---
name: s
description: |
disable-model-invocation: false
user-invocable: true
---
# Body

cases.name: quoted-empty block array item with comment
cases.text:
---
name: s
description: d
disable-model-invocation: false
user-invocable: true
kramme-platforms:
  - "" # placeholder
---
# Body

cases.name: flow array with numeric leading-dot item
cases.text:
---
name: s
description: d
disable-model-invocation: false
user-invocable: true
kramme-platforms: [codex, .5]
---
# Body

cases.name: flow array with nested sequence item
cases.text:
---
name: s
description: d
disable-model-invocation: false
user-invocable: true
kramme-platforms: [codex, [nested]]
---
# Body

cases.name: block array with nested mapping item
cases.text:
---
name: s
description: d
disable-model-invocation: false
user-invocable: true
kramme-platforms:
  - target:
      name: codex
---
# Body

cases.name: flow array alias and non-string tag rejected
cases.text:
---
name: s
description: d
disable-model-invocation: false
user-invocable: true
kramme-platforms: [codex, *target]
---
# Body

cases.name: boolean field given a number
cases.text:
---
name: s
description: d
disable-model-invocation: false
user-invocable: 1
---
# Body

cases.name: string field given a plain integer
cases.text:
---
name: 42
description: d
disable-model-invocation: false
user-invocable: true
---
# Body

cases.name: bare string for platforms rejected
cases.text:
---
name: s
description: d
disable-model-invocation: false
user-invocable: true
kramme-platforms: codex
---
# Body
